message:
🌱 Wrap GitHubActivity list items in React.memo (#10056)

Wrap PRItem, IssueItem, ReleaseItem, and ContributorItem in memo()
to prevent unnecessary re-renders when the parent GitHubActivity
component re-renders but item props haven't changed.

These components are rendered inside .map() loops with potentially
50+ items. Without memo, every parent re-render (e.g. from
pagination, filtering, or polling) causes all list items to
re-render even when their individual props are unchanged.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
